revision.comment: Undid revision 859064435 by [[Special:Contributions/MSGJ|MSGJ]] ([[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]), see talk page
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:#switch:{{{mode|}}}
| link = {{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{article|}}}|yes|{{safesubst:Iso2country/article|{{{1}}}}}}} [[{{safesubst:Iso2country/data|{{{1}}}|mode=unique}}{{!}}{{safesubst:Iso2country/data|{{{1}}}}}]]
| sort = {{safesubst:Iso2country/data|{{{1}}}|mode=sort}}
| {{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{article|}}}|yes|{{safesubst:Iso2country/article|{{{1}}}}}}} {{safesubst:Iso2country/data|{{{1}}}|mode={{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{template|}}}|yes|unique|{{{mode|}}}}}}}
}}{{safesubst:#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using iso2country with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Iso2country]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y|  | 1 | article | mode }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

| link = {{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{article|}}}|yes|{{safesubst:Iso2country/article|{{{1}}}}}}} [[{{safesubst:Iso2country/data|{{{1}}}|mode=unique}}{{!}}{{safesubst:Iso2country/data|{{{1}}}}}]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>
